new_value: Replaced stack VLA with static struct lichen_key_entry entries[CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES] in coap_keys.c:617 to eliminate stack pressure on constrained platforms (STM32WL 64KB RAM). Updated encode_keys_list_cbor(), verified with lichen/tests/coap_keys (all 9 ZTESTs pass including truncation and CBOR validity). 3 independent codereview passes completed (no P0-P2 findings; P4 style nits addressed in prior epic). Tests: west build -b native_sim + ztest run. Closed P4 bug.
